notes: Starts fullscreen in 800*600, have to press ALT+ENTER to go into windowed mode. Then kill the game with ALT+F4 and restart it, it is perfectly playable in windowed mode.
title: Numba Deluxe

notes: Works like Cobi Treasure Deluxe : "Alt+Enter" for windowed mode -> "Alt+F4" for kill the game -> restart the game. After that, game is playable on a 800*600 window.
title: Numba Deluxe

notes: Fullscreen resolution is messed but, switch to window mode by ALT + ENTER and restart the game (ALT + F4). Now you can play it in 800x600 window mode.
title: Numba Deluxe
